text:
The agent is at the start of the episode with a goal distance of 6320 cm and a bearing of +100 degrees. I need to calibrate the bearing sign convention first. According to skill #6, I should execute one deliberate test turn to observe how the bearing value changes.

I'll start by turning left to see how the bearing changes. If turning left decreases the bearing (moves it closer to 0), then left turns are the correct direction to align with the goal. If it increases, then right turns would be better.

Let me turn left first to calibrate.
</think>

<tool_call>
<function=TURN_LEFT>
</function>
</tool_call>
